data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective orange and cyan color pops. Split-screen composition: LEFT side shows abstract node graph with glowing connection lines and circular nodes, RIGHT side shows a 3D wireframe viewport with a geometric shape rotating. A bright data stream bridges the two halves, flowing from node output to 3D scene. Technical but artistic. High contrast shadows.
